collectedPage.title: The AI workspace that works for you. | Notion
collectedPage.content: Meet the night shift.Notion agents keep work moving 24/7. They capture knowledge, answer questions, and push projects forward—all while you sleep. [Get Notion free](https://www.notion.com/signup?from=marketing&pathname=%2F&tid=54bbef664d4e4d3bb82e4a24240a19aa) [Request a demo](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) PlayTrusted by 98% of the Forbes Cloud 100 Keep work moving 24/7. [Custom AgentsAutomate repetitive work for your team.→](https://www.notion.com/product/agents) Q&A agentsAnswers questions instantly using knowledge you already have.Task routing agentsAssigns, prioritizes, and routes tasks on its own.Reporting agentsSummarizes, writes, and sends reports for you.Create your ownMake a Custom Agent for any work that repeats.Q&A agentsAnswers questions instantly using knowledge you already have.See what Custom Agents can do Triage product feedback→ Resolve support tickets in Slack→ Respond to security alerts faster→ Automate weekly reporting→ Create your own Custom Agent→Ask your on-demand assistants. Notion AgentYou assign the tasks. Notion Agent does the work.→ Enterprise SearchOne search for everything.→ AI Meeting NotesPerfect notes, every time.→Bring all your work together. DocsSimple and powerful.→ Knowledge BaseOne source of truth for teams and agents.→ ProjectsLess tracking. More progress.→Your AI everything app.Trusted by teams that ship.There’s power in a single platform where you can do all your work. Notion is that single place. [Read the full story→](https://www.notion.com/customers/openai) View the video [Streamlined workflows to reduce timelines by 3x.→](https://www.notion.com/customers/toyota) [“Agents get created in three minutes between meetings, then hours of manual operational work disappear.”→](https://www.notion.com/customers/ramp) [“Notion understands that you can solve a lot of problems with one tool.”→](https://www.notion.com/customers/vercel) [“Notion has been the most powerful and impactful way to streamline our workflow.”→](https://www.notion.com/customers/match) [“Using the most AI-native tools like Notion is an important competitive advantage for us.”→](https://www.notion.com/customers/cursor) [One hub for work and AI keeps everyone informed and work flowing.→](https://www.notion.com/customers/figma) Over 100M users worldwide#1 knowledge base 3 years running (G2)#1 AI enterprise search (G2)#1 rated AI writing (G2)62% of Fortune 100Over 50% of YC companies1.4M+ community membersOver 100M users worldwide#1 knowledge base 3 years running (G2)#1 AI enterprise search (G2)#1 rated AI writing (G2)62% of Fortune 100Over 50% of YC companies1.4M+ community membersOver 100M users worldwide#1 knowledge base 3 years running (G2)#1 AI enterprise search (G2)#1 rated AI writing (G2)62% of Fortune 100Over 50% of YC companies1.4M+ community membersTry for free.Get started on NotionYour AI workspace with built-in agents. [Download for Windows](https://www.notion.com/desktop/windows/download?from=marketing&pathname=%2F&tid=54bbef664d4e4d3bb82e4a24240a19aa) Notion MailThe AI inbox that thinks like you. [Download](https://www.notion.com/product/mail/download) Notion CalendarTime, scheduling, tasks—all together. [Download](https://www.notion.com/product/calendar/download) Notion is always at home right [in your browser](https://www.notion.com/signup) .

collectedPage.title: Meet your AI team | Notion
collectedPage.content: Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. Answer questions, prioritize tasks, and write reports—all while you sleep. [Try for free](https://www.notion.com/signup?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=f15a151fcd9841b492a1b4be59aa5864) [Request a demo](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) Trusted by teams atAgentsEnterprise searchAI Meeting NotesAdmin controlsEnterprise Search 16:10Admin Controls 16:10If it’s something that’s repetitive, we have a Notion Agent for it.Ben LevickHead of AI & Operations, RampAI that works where your team works. Try for free.Free$0per member / monthFor individuals to organize personal projects and life. [Sign up](https://www.notion.com/signup) Includes:Trial AI capabilities like generating docs, or autofilling databasesTrial of Notion AICapture, organize, and act on responses right inside Notion.Basic formsPublish a Notion page to the webBasic sitesConnect multiple Calendars to manage work and time together.Notion CalendarConnect your Gmail for an AI-powered, personalized inbox.Notion Mail (Syncs with Gmail)Organize hundreds or thousands of items in one place, like projects or tasksDatabases including subtasks, dependencies, custom properties and moreBusinessRecommended$20per member / monthFor growing businesses to streamline teamwork. [Get started](https://www.notion.com/signup?target=plans) Everything in Plus, and:Does work for you. Completes complex, multi-step tasks using context from Notion, your connected apps, and the web.Notion AgentAI agents handle repetitive tasks autonomously, so your team doesn’t have to. Free to try, then $10 per 1,000 credits.Custom AgentsAutomate your meeting notes and follow-ups, no bot neededAI Meeting NotesSearch across connected apps like Slack, Github & moreEnterprise SearchBetaManage employee access at scale with secure single sign-on.SAML SSOCollaborate in Notion databases without giving access to the entire database. Limit access to rows where the collaborator is assigned.Granular database permissionsAdd a verified badge to pages that are up to date. Appears in search results and AI citations.Verify any pageCreate teamspaces that can’t be seen or discovered by anyone except those you add. Great for sensitive information like company planning or performance reviews.Private teamspacesVerify ownership of an email domain to access advanced security features including single-sign on.Domain verificationConnect to GitHub, Asana & morePremium connectionsCustom Agents automate work that repeats.Set them up once, and the entire team benefits. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/agents) All our teams, docs, and workflows are in Notion, and it’s listening to Slack. When your agents have full context across the company, that’s what makes them useful.Morgane PalomaresVP of Marketing, BraintrustYour Notion Agent can build, edit, and take action.Anything you can do in Notion, your Notion Agent can do for you. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/agents) Enterprise Search finds answers across all your apps.Search across Slack, Google Drive, GitHub & more—in seconds. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/enterprise-search) AI Meeting Notes gives your team perfect meeting memory.Capture every detail and actionable summaries, right where you work. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai-meeting-notes) Designed for teams.Usage & analytics dashboardsTrack Notion credit usage, view detailed analytics and ROI insights.Custom permissionsYou’re in control of what Notion AI can see and do.Model agnosticSwitch any workflow to a different model or provider, without losing any context.Governance tools & controlsGet a bird’s eye view of AI actions across your workspace, with controls for who can do what.Trusted by enterprise. [Learn more about security practices →](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices?_gl=1*p1njrn*_gcl_au*MTcxMjUyNjE2LjE3NDQ4MTY4MzM.*_ga*MTgyNjkyNzg0MS4xNzI5MTA5MzMx*_ga_9ZJ8CB186L*MTc0NjA0NDM5Mi4yMzcuMS4xNzQ2MDQ1Njk5LjUwLjAuMA..) No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=f15a151fcd9841b492a1b4be59aa5864) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.

Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=f15a151fcd9841b492a1b4be59aa5864) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.

results.title: Meet your AI team | Notion
results.content: Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. Answer questions, prioritize tasks, and write reports—all while you sleep. [Try for free](https://www.notion.com/signup?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=f15a151fcd9841b492a1b4be59aa5864) [Request a demo](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) Trusted by teams atAgentsEnterprise searchAI Meeting NotesAdmin controlsEnterprise Search 16:10Admin Controls 16:10If it’s something that’s repetitive, we have a Notion Agent for it.Ben LevickHead of AI & Operations, RampAI that works where your team works. Try for free.Free$0per member / monthFor individuals to organize personal projects and life. [Sign up](https://www.notion.com/signup) Includes:Trial AI capabilities like generating docs, or autofilling databasesTrial of Notion AICapture, organize, and act on responses right inside Notion.Basic formsPublish a Notion page to the webBasic sitesConnect multiple Calendars to manage work and time together.Notion CalendarConnect your Gmail for an AI-powered, personalized inbox.Notion Mail (Syncs with Gmail)Organize hundreds or thousands of items in one place, like projects or tasksDatabases including subtasks, dependencies, custom properties and moreBusinessRecommended$20per member / monthFor growing businesses to streamline teamwork. [Get started](https://www.notion.com/signup?target=plans) Everything in Plus, and:Does work for you. Completes complex, multi-step tasks using context from Notion, your connected apps, and the web.Notion AgentAI agents handle repetitive tasks autonomously, so your team doesn’t have to. Free to try, then $10 per 1,000 credits.Custom AgentsAutomate your meeting notes and follow-ups, no bot neededAI Meeting NotesSearch across connected apps like Slack, Github & moreEnterprise SearchBetaManage employee access at scale with secure single sign-on.SAML SSOCollaborate in Notion databases without giving access to the entire database. Limit access to rows where the collaborator is assigned.Granular database permissionsAdd a verified badge to pages that are up to date. Appears in search results and AI citations.Verify any pageCreate teamspaces that can’t be seen or discovered by anyone except those you add. Great for sensitive information like company planning or performance reviews.Private teamspacesVerify ownership of an email domain to access advanced security features including single-sign on.Domain verificationConnect to GitHub, Asana & morePremium connectionsCustom Agents automate work that repeats.Set them up once, and the entire team benefits. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/agents) All our teams, docs, and workflows are in Notion, and it’s listening to Slack. When your agents have full context across the company, that’s what makes them useful.Morgane PalomaresVP of Marketing, BraintrustYour Notion Agent can build, edit, and take action.Anything you can do in Notion, your Notion Agent can do for you. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/agents) Enterprise Search finds answers across all your apps.Search across Slack, Google Drive, GitHub & more—in seconds. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/enterprise-search) AI Meeting Notes gives your team perfect meeting memory.Capture every detail and actionable summaries, right where you work. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai-meeting-notes) Designed for teams.Usage & analytics dashboardsTrack Notion credit usage, view detailed analytics and ROI insights.Custom permissionsYou’re in control of what Notion AI can see and do.Model agnosticSwitch any workflow to a different model or provider, without losing any context.Governance tools & controlsGet a bird’s eye view of AI actions across your workspace, with controls for who can do what.Trusted by enterprise. [Learn more about security practices →](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices?_gl=1*p1njrn*_gcl_au*MTcxMjUyNjE2LjE3NDQ4MTY4MzM.*_ga*MTgyNjkyNzg0MS4xNzI5MTA5MzMx*_ga_9ZJ8CB186L*MTc0NjA0NDM5Mi4yMzcuMS4xNzQ2MDQ1Njk5LjUwLjAuMA..) No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=f15a151fcd9841b492a1b4be59aa5864) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.

No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. [Learn more about security practices →](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices?_gl=1*p1njrn*_gcl_au*MTcxMjUyNjE2LjE3NDQ4MTY4MzM.*_ga*MTgyNjkyNzg0MS4xNzI5MTA5MzMx*_ga_9ZJ8CB186L*MTc0NjA0NDM5Mi4yMzcuMS4xNzQ2MDQ1Njk5LjUwLjAuMA..) No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=f15a151fcd9841b492a1b4be59aa5864) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.","snippet":"Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=f15a151fcd9841b492a1b4be59aa5864) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.","sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"issueFlags":[],"documentVersion":1,"status":"READY","failureReason":null,"collectedAt":[2026,6,24,15,14,34,687444600],"createdAt":[2026,6,24,15,14,34,705291100],"updatedAt":[2026,6,24,15,14,34,786607100]},"retrievalChunks":[{"id":9455,"taskId":56,"knowledgeDocumentId":61,"competitorName":"Notion AI","evidenceId":"T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001","documentKey":"TASK-56-T0056-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001","retrievalScope":"TASK","scopeRefKey":"56","knowledgeDomainKey":null,"chunkKey":"TASK-56-T0056-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001#CHUNK-001","chunkIndex":0,"startOffset":0,"endOffset":600,"sourceCategory":"AI_DISCOVERED","documentVersion":1,"content":"Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=f15a151fcd9841b492a1b4be59aa5864) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.","sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"issueFlags":[],"qualitySignals":["MAIN_CONTENT_READY","NO_STRUCTURED_BLOCKS"],"structuredBlocks":[],"structuredPayload":{},"quality":{"qualityScore":0.92,"failureKind":null,"durationMillis":4562}}],"knowledgeDocuments":[{"id":61,"taskId":56,"competitorName":"Notion AI","evidenceId":"T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001","documentKey":"TASK-56-T0056-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001","knowledgeScope":"TASK","knowledgeDomainId":null,"knowledgeDomainKey":null,"sourceType":"OFFICIAL","sourceCategory":"AI_DISCOVERED","discoveryMethod":"DIRECT_LOCATOR","sourceDomain":"notion.so","sourceLifecycle":"ACTIVE","trustLevel":"DISCOVERED","connectorKey":null,"title":"Meet your AI team | Notion","url":"https://notion.so/product/ai","snippet":"Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. [Learn more about security practices →](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices?_gl=1*p1njrn*_gcl_au*MTcxMjUyNjE2LjE3NDQ4MTY4MzM.*_ga*MTgyNjkyNzg0MS4xNzI5MTA5MzMx*_ga_9ZJ8CB186L*MTc0NjA0NDM5Mi4yMzcuMS4xNzQ2MDQ1Njk5LjUwLjAuMA..) No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=f15a151fcd9841b492a1b4be59aa5864) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.","sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"issueFlags":[],"documentVersion":1,"status":"READY","failureReason":null,"collectedAt":[2026,6,24,15,14,34,687444600],"createdAt":[2026,6,24,15,14,34,705291100],"updatedAt":[2026,6,24,15,14,34,786607100]}],"retrievalChunks":[{"id":9455,"taskId":56,"knowledgeDocumentId":61,"competitorName":"Notion AI","evidenceId":"T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001","documentKey":"TASK-56-T0056-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001","retrievalScope":"TASK","scopeRefKey":"56","knowledgeDomainKey":null,"chunkKey":"TASK-56-T0056-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001#CHUNK-001","chunkIndex":0,"startOffset":0,"endOffset":600,"sourceCategory":"AI_DISCOVERED","documentVersion":1,"content":"Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. {"contractVersion":"1.0","content":"# 竞品分析报告：企业级 RAG 知识库平台 vs. Notion AI

**报告日期：2026-06-26**
**版本：1.0**
**分析对象：Notion AI**
**主要证据来源：https://notion.so/product/ai**

## 1. 产品概览

Notion AI 是一款深度集成于 Notion 工作区的人工智能助手，其产品愿景是打造一个“全天候工作的AI团队”（24/7 AI team），旨在无缝融入团队的日常工作流，提升协作效率 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。该产品不仅能够回答问题、设定任务优先级和撰写报告，更进一步地，其核心能力在于能够作为AI代理，直接在工作区内执行操作，从而自动化处理那些重复性高、耗时长的繁琐任务 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。

对于本方的“企业级 RAG 知识库平台”而言，Notion AI 代表了一种“工作流原生”的AI应用模式。它的核心价值并非独立于业务系统之外提供一个纯粹的知识检索工具，而是将AI能力作为协作平台的“神经系统”，直接连接、理解并操作平台内已有的全部知识和工作。这为我们展示了一个重要的竞争维度：知识库的价值不仅在于“找得到”，更在于能够驱动“做得好”。

## 2. 多维度竞品剖析

### 2.1 功能对比

Notion AI 的核心功能围绕“自动化”和“上下文感知”构建，形成了一个从搜索到行动、从个人到团队的完整AI功能矩阵。

- **Notion Agent（AI代理）：** 这是一个能够进行多步骤推理和操作的智能体，能够利用其在 Notion、已连接的外部应用以及网页中的上下文，自主完成复杂的任务 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。这是其区别于简单问答机器人的核心功能。
- **Custom Agents（自定义代理）：** 允许用户为特定的重复性工作流创建专属的AI代理，“设置一次，全团队受益”，采用按量付费模式（每1000积分10美元） [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。
- **Enterprise Search（企业搜索）：** 一个跨平台的语义搜索引擎，能够在数秒内从 Slack、Google Drive、GitHub 等多个已连接的应用中搜寻并整合答案 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。此功能直接对标本方的RAG知识库能力。
- **AI Meeting Notes（AI会议笔记）：** 能够自动捕捉会议内容并生成可操作的摘要和待办事项，关键在于无需额外的机器人加入会议，保持了会议的私密性和流畅性 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。
- **Admin Controls & Governance（管理控制与治理）：** 提供了企业级安全和管理功能，包括使用分析仪表板、自定义权限设置以及模型无关性（允许在不同AI模型间切换而不丢失上下文） [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。

**对比分析：** Notion AI 的企业搜索功能在跨应用连接和整合方面表现出色，但其核心假设是所有知识最终都流入Notion生态。本方的“企业级 RAG 知识库平台”在非 Notion 用户群体、对特定垂直领域深度知识库构建、以及对数据存储和处理有更严格合规要求的场景下，拥有更灵活和专业的优势。

### 2.2 市场定位

Notion AI 的市场定位口号是 **“AI that works where your team works”**（内置于团队协作空间中的AI助手） [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。其定位非常明确：它不是一个独立的产品，而是作为 Notion 核心平台的增值能力，旨在通过深度嵌入实现“1+1>2”的协同效应。其价值主张是为使用Notion的团队提供一个随需而变的、可执行的智能层，从而极大地提升平台粘性与工作流效率。

### 2.3 目标用户

依据其功能设计和定位，Notion AI 的目标用户群体覆盖了整个生产力光谱，主要包括 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]：

- **个人用户：** 希望提升个人知识管理和工作效率的自由职业者或创作者。
- **团队：** 追求自动化协作、优化流程的中小型团队，其核心痛点是减少上下文切换和重复劳动。
- **成长型企业：** 处于快速扩张阶段，需要用工具固化知识和工作流的组织。
- **企业客户：** 对安全、治理和跨部门知识整合有高要求的规模化组织。

这种从个人到企业的全覆盖策略，使得Notion AI能够在用户组织的不同成长阶段持续提供价值。

### 2.4 定价策略

Notion AI 主打的 AI 附加功能采用名为 **“Custom Agents”** 的按量付费模式。用户可免费试用，随后按每消耗 1,000 个积分支付 10 美元的费用 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。这种与使用量直接挂钩的定价模式，降低了用户的初始尝试门槛，同时又能将成本与实际价值创造直接关联，对使用频率较高的企业用户来说，成本效益的透明化是关键吸引力。然而，其具体的基础套餐价格和分级并未在此次公开证据中充分展示 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]，这导致无法与本方产品进行全面的价格对比。

### 2.5 优势判断

Notion AI 的核心优势建立在 Notion 强大的生态系统之上，具体表现为：
1.  **极致的平台集成与自动化：** 能够深度访问 Notion 工作区内的任何信息，并执行操作，有效自动化重复性任务 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。其能力得到了用户如 Ramp 的 Ben Levick 的正面评价。
2.  **跨应用的上下文协同：** AI代理能跨 Slack 等应用协同工作，打破了信息孤岛，实现无缝的上下文流转 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。用户 Morgane Palomares 的证言支撑了这一优势。
3.  **模型无关性与安全性并重：** 提供了在不同AI模型间自由切换的灵活性，同时不牺牲上下文，并配备了页面验证、私有团队空间等细粒度的企业级安全与治理控制 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。这精准地切中了大中型企业对技术自主和数据安全的双重需求。

### 2.6 短板与风险

**（证据缺陷说明）** 由于来自官方的公开资料旨在展示产品优势，本次分析未能直接获取到关于 Notion AI 弱点的证据 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。以下分析基于行业普遍规律和对 Notion AI 产品形态的观察，属于推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。

1.**生态锁定风险（Vendor Lock-in）：** Notion AI 的强大能力高度依赖于 Notion 平台内的数据（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。其企业搜索功能虽然能连接外部应用，但其最核心的AI代理能力还是以Notion为中心枢纽（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。对于希望保持中立、避免被单一平台绑定的企业客户而言，这是一个潜在的风险点（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。
2.**知识深度与专精化不足：** 作为一个通用型的、面向所有用户的AI助手，它在处理特定垂直行业（如法律、医疗、金融）的深度、高度专业化的知识库和复杂合规文档时，可能不如本方的专业“企业级 RAG 知识库平台”精准和可靠（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。
3.**成本不可预测性：** 按量付费模式对于使用量波动巨大的企业而言，可能带来月度账单的不可预测性，尤其是在AI代理被大规模部署和使用的场景下，成本控制是一个挑战（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。

## 3. 结论与启示

### 3.1 对本方产品的机会

- **差异化定位机会：** 市场存在对平台中立、开放的专业RAG知识库的需求（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。本方产品应强化“独立、专业、可集成”的形象，专门服务于不希望被Notion生态锁定的企业，以及那些对深度知识处理有更高要求的专业领域（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。
- **深度与专业性机会：** Notion AI 追求广度和易用性，本方产品可在深度和精确性上实现反超（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。特别是在处理复杂图表、长文档、专利文本，以及需要精确引源溯源的合规场景中，构建专业级的技术壁垒（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。
- **数据安全与合规机会：** 对于数据主权和私有化部署有严格要求的客户（如政府、金融机构），本方产品可提供私有云或本地部署方案，这将是相对于纯SaaS模式的Notion AI的绝对优势（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。

### 3.2 对本方产品的风险

- **市场认知风险：** Notion AI 这种“工作流原生”的AI形态，可能会重新教育市场，使用户认为AI知识库不应是一个独立系统，而应是协作平台的一个功能（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。这可能会压缩独立知识库产品的市场认知空间（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。
- **产品迭代速度风险：** Notion 拥有庞大的用户基础和海量交互数据，这使其AI模型能够快速迭代和优化（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。其在企业搜索等直接竞争领域的提升速度可能非常快，这要求我方必须保持更敏捷的研发节奏和清晰的功能演进路径（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。

### 3.3 行动建议

1.**强化“专业深度”标签，构建垂直行业解决方案：**（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）
    - **建议：** 选择1-2个Notion AI在功能和合规上难以覆盖的垂直领域（如知识产权审查、金融研究分析），开发端到端的行业知识库解决方案（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。
    - **理由：** 此举旨在建立不可替代的专业性护城河，而非在通用功能上与Notion AI进行消耗战 [风险：市场认知风险]（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。

2.**实施“平台中立”的生态集成战略：**（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）
    - **建议：** 投入资源开发高质量、标准化的连接器，确保能与主流的企业协作平台（包括但不限于Notion、飞书、钉钉、Teams）无缝对接（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。
    - **理由：** 将与平台的“集成能力”而非”绑定关系“作为核心卖点，精准吸引那些采用多平台策略的、看重灵活性的企业客户 [机会：差异化定位机会]（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。

3.**构建可解释、可溯源的RAG能力标杆：**（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）
    - **建议：** 在产品的“引文溯源”和“事实核查”功能上做到极致，形成技术优势（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。需要做到每条生成的回答都能清晰地指向原始文档的具体片段，并给出置信度评分（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。
    - **理由：** 这是专业级知识库相较于通用AI助手最本质的优势，能直接建立起“负责任AI”的品牌形象，并在高合规性要求的场景中建立信任 [机会：深度与专业性机会]（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。","summary":"初版报告：# 竞品分析报告：企业级 RAG 知识库平台 vs. Notion AI  **报告日期：2026-06-26** **版本：1.0** **分析对象：Notion AI** **主要证据来源：https://notion.so/product/ai**  ## 1. 产品概览  Notion AI 是一款深度集成于 Notion 工作区的人工智能助手，其产品愿景是打造一个“全天候工作的AI团队”（24/7 AI team），旨在无缝融入团队的日常工作流，提升协作效率 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。该产品不仅能够回答问题、设定任务优先级和撰写报告，更...","revisionMode":false,"sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"writerEvidenceState":"PARTIAL_SOURCE","citationGapSeverity":"HIGH","missingCitationSections":["weaknesses","conclusion","report_conclusion"],"sectionCitationGaps":[{"targetSection":"weaknesses","sectionTitle":"短板与风险","summary":"缺少字段证据：weaknessesSummary","severity":"HIGH","sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"evidenceState":"PARTIAL_SOURCE","missingFields":["weaknessesSummary"],"suggestedQueries":["weaknesses official citation evidence","weaknesses weaknessesSummary official source"]},{"targetSection":"conclusion","sectionTitle":"结论与建议","summary":"缺少字段证据：recommendations","severity":"HIGH","sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"evidenceState":"PARTIAL_SOURCE","missingFields":["recommendations"],"suggestedQueries":["conclusion official citation evidence","conclusion recommendations official source"]},{"targetSection":"report_conclusion","sectionTitle":"报告结论","summary":"缺少字段证据：recommendations","severity":"HIGH","sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"evidenceState":"PARTIAL_SOURCE","missingFields":["recommendations"],"suggestedQueries":["report_conclusion official citation evidence","report_conclusion recommendations official source"]}],"taskRagContext":"知识上下文

1. write_report -> {"contractVersion":"1.0","content":"# 竞品分析报告：企业级 RAG 知识库平台 vs. Notion AI\n\n**报告日期：2026-06-26**\n**版本：1.0**\n**分析对象：Notion AI**\n**主要证据来源：https://notion.so/product/ai**\n\n## 1. 产品概览\n\nNotion AI 是一款深度集成于 Notion 工作区的人工智能助手，其产品愿景是打造一个“全天候工作的AI团队”（24/7 AI team），旨在无缝融入团队的日常工作流，提升协作效率 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。该产品不仅能够回答问题、设定任务优先级和撰写报告，更进一步地，其核心能力在于能够作为AI代理，直接在工作区内执行操作，从而自动化处理那些重复性高、耗时长的繁琐任务 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。\n\n对于本方的“企业级 RAG 知识库平台”而言，Notion AI 代表了一种“工作流原生”的AI应用模式。它的核心价值并非独立于业务系统之外提供一个纯粹的知识检索工具，而是将AI能力作为协作平台的“神经系统”，直接连接、理解并操作平台内已有的全部知识和工作。这为我们展示了一个重要的竞争维度：知识库的价值不仅在于“找得到”，更在于能够驱动“做得好”。\n\n## 2. 多维度竞品剖析\n\n### 2.1 功能对比\n\nNotion AI 的核心功能围绕“自动化”和“上下文感知”构建，形成了一个从搜索到行动、从个人到团队的完整AI功能矩阵。\n\n- **Notion Agent（AI代理）：** 这是一个能够进行多步骤推理和操作的智能体，能够利用其在 Notion、已连接的外部应用以及网页中的上下文，自主完成复杂的任务 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。这是其区别于简单问答机器人的核心功能。\n- **Custom Agents（自定义代理）：** 允许用户为特定的重复性工作流创建专属的AI代理，“设置一次，全团队受益”，采用按量付费模式（每1000积分10美元） [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。\n- **Enterprise Search（企业搜索）：** 一个跨平台的语义搜索引擎，能够在数秒内从 Slack、Google Drive、GitHub 等多个已连接的应用中搜寻并整合答案 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。此功能直接对标本方的RAG知识库能力。\n- **AI Meeting Notes（AI会议笔记）：** 能够自动捕捉会议内容并生成可操作的摘要和待办事项，关键在于无需额外的机器人加入会议，保持了会议的私密性和流畅性 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。\n- **Admin Controls & Governance（管理控制与治理）：** 提供了企业级安全和管理功能，包括使用分析仪表板、自定义权限设置以及模型无关性（允许在不同AI模型间切换而不丢失上下文） [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。\n\n**对比分析：** Notion AI 的企业搜索功能在跨应用连接和整合方面表现出色，但其核心假设是所有知识最终都流入Notion生态。本方的“企业级 RAG 知识库平台”在非 Notion 用户群体、对特定垂直领域深度知识库构建、以及对数据存储和处理有更严格合规要求的场景下，拥有更灵活和专业的优势。\n\n### 2.2 市场定位\n\nNotion AI 的市场定位口号是 **“AI that works where your team works”**（内置于团队协作空间中的AI助手） [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。其定位非常明确：它不是一个独立的产品，而是作为 Notion 核心平台的增值能力，旨在通过深度嵌入实现“1+1>2”的协同效应。其价值主张是为使用Notion的团队提供一个随需而变的、可执行的智能层，从而极大地提升平台粘性与工作流效率。\n\n### 2.3 目标用户\n\n依据其功能设计和定位，Notion AI 的目标用户群体覆盖了整个生产力光谱，主要包括 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]：\n\n- **个人用户：** 希望提升个人知识管理和工作效率的自由职业者或创作者。\n- **团队：** 追求自动化协作、优化流程的中小型团队，其核心痛点是减少上下文切换和重复劳动。\n- **成长型企业：** 处于快速扩张阶段，需要用工具固化知识和工作流的组织。\n- **企业客户：** 对安全、治理和跨部门知识整合有高要求的规模化组织。\n\n这种从个人到企业的全覆盖策略，使得Notion AI能够在用户组织的不同成长阶段持续提供价值。\n\n### 2.4 定价策略\n\nNotion AI 主打的 AI 附加功能采用名为 **“Custom Agents”** 的按量付费模式。用户可免费试用，随后按每消耗 1,000 个积分支付 10 美元的费用 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。这种与使用量直接挂钩的定价模式，降低了用户的初始尝试门槛，同时又能将成本与实际价值创造直接关联，对使用频率较高的企业用户来说，成本效益的透明化是关键吸引力。然而，其具体的基础套餐价格和分级并未在此次公开证据中充分展示 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]，这导致无法与本方产品进行全面的价格对比。\n\n### 2.5 优势判断\n\nNotion AI 的核心优势建立在 Notion 强大的生态系统之上，具体表现为：\n1.  **极致的平台集成与自动化：** 能够深度访问 Notion 工作区内的任何信息，并执行操作，有效自动化重复性任务 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。其能力得到了用户如 Ramp 的 Ben Levick 的正面评价。\n2.  **跨应用的上下文协同：** AI代理能跨 Slack 等应用协同工作，打破了信息孤岛，实现无缝的上下文流转 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。用户 Morgane Palomares 的证言支撑了这一优势。\n3.  **模型无关性与安全性并重：** 提供了在不同AI模型间自由切换的灵活性，同时不牺牲上下文，并配备了页面验证、私有团队空间等细粒度的企业级安全与治理控制 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。这精准地切中了大中型企业对技术自主和数据安全的双重需求。\n\n### 2.6 短板与风险\n\n**（证据缺陷说明）** 由于来自官方的公开资料旨在展示产品优势，本次分析未能直接获取到关于 Notion AI 弱点的证据 [证据：T0056-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。以下分析基于行业普遍规律和对 Notion AI 产品形态的观察，属于推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。\n\n1.**生态锁定风险（Vendor Lock-in）：** Notion AI 的强大能力高度依赖于 Notion 平台内的数据（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。其企业搜索功能虽然能连接外部应用，但其最核心的AI代理能力还是以Notion为中心枢纽（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。对于希望保持中立、避免被单一平台绑定的企业客户而言，这是一个潜在的风险点（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。\n2.**知识深度与专精化不足：** 作为一个通用型的、面向所有用户的AI助手，它在处理特定垂直行业（如法律、医疗、金融）的深度、高度专业化的知识库和复杂合规文档时，可能不如本方的专业“企业级 RAG 知识库平台”精准和可靠（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。\n3.**成本不可预测性：** 按量付费模式对于使用量波动巨大的企业而言，可能带来月度账单的不可预测性，尤其是在AI代理被大规模部署和使用的场景下，成本控制是一个挑战（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。\n\n## 3. 结论与启示\n\n### 3.1 对本方产品的机会\n\n- **差异化定位机会：** 市场存在对平台中立、开放的专业RAG知识库的需求（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。本方产品应强化“独立、专业、可集成”的形象，专门服务于不希望被Notion生态锁定的企业，以及那些对深度知识处理有更高要求的专业领域（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。\n- **深度与专业性机会：** Notion AI 追求广度和易用性，本方产品可在深度和精确性上实现反超（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。特别是在处理复杂图表、长文档、专利文本，以及需要精确引源溯源的合规场景中，构建专业级的技术壁垒（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。\n- **数据安全与合规机会：** 对于数据主权和私有化部署有严格要求的客户（如政府、金融机构），本方产品可提供私有云或本地部署方案，这将是相对于纯SaaS模式的Notion AI的绝对优势（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。\n\n### 3.2 对本方产品的风险\n\n- **市场认知风险：** Notion AI 这种“工作流原生”的AI形态，可能会重新教育市场，使用户认为AI知识库不应是一个独立系统，而应是协作平台的一个功能（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。这可能会压缩独立知识库产品的市场认知空间（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。\n- **产品迭代速度风险：** Notion 拥有庞大的用户基础和海量交互数据，这使其AI模型能够快速迭代和优化（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。其在企业搜索等直接竞争领域的提升速度可能非常快，这要求我方必须保持更敏捷的研发节奏和清晰的功能演进路径（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据。\n\n### 3.3 行动建议\n\n1.**强化“专业深度”标签，构建垂直行业解决方案：**（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）\n    - **建议：** 选择1-2个Notion AI在功能和合规上难以覆盖的垂直领域（如知识产权审查、金融研究分析），开发端到端的行业知识库解决方案（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。\n    - **理由：**
